# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write an Istio configuration that enables Envoy admin interface on all sidecars. Set proxyAdminPort to 15000 and make it accessible for debugging. Expose admin endpoints like /config_dump, /stats, and /clusters on all pods. This is for troubleshooting service mesh issues in production.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: EnvoyFilter
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-access
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  workloadSelector:
    labels:
      istio: sidecar
  configPatches:
    - applyTo: NETWORK_FILTER
      match:
        context: SIDECAR_INBOUND
        listener:
          portNumber: 15000
          filterChain:
            filter:
              name: "envoy.http_connection_manager"
      patch:
        operation: INSERT_BEFORE
        value:
          name: envoy.filters.network.admin
          typed_config:
            "@type": type.googleapis.com/envoy.config.filter.network.admin.v2.Admin
            accessLogPath: "/dev/null"
            address:
              socketAddress: {address: "0.0.0.0", portValue: 15000}
            profilePath: "/dev/null"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1alpha3
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: envoy-admin-endpoints
  namespace: istio-system
spec:
  hosts:
    - "*"
  gateways:
    - istio-system/istio-autogenerated-k8s-ingress
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: "/config_dump"
        - uri:
            prefix: "/stats"
        - uri:
            prefix: "/clusters"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: istio-pilot.istio-system.svc.cluster.local
            port:
              number: 15000
